## Why this resource is on the list

This resource gives a concrete example of a tool designed to work from uploaded
sources, citations, and document evidence. It pairs well with the module on
context windows and RAG because it makes the difference between free-form text
generation and source-grounded work very visible.

::: {.teacher-only}
Use it after the demo and ask participants which tasks require citations and
which can be handled with ordinary chat.
:::
